cards.rules_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Ward {2}
When Lord Fredrik enters, put two stun counters on each tapped nonland permanent your opponents control.
Whenever Lord Fredrik attacks, draw a card for each tapped nonland permanent defending player controls, then discard a card.

Menace
Whenever Jr. Troopa or another legendary creature dies, clear a stage. [i](When you clear a stage, draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world. Draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)[/i]

Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block.” This ability triggers only once each turn.
Whenever Spoiled Rotten attacks, you may sacrifice up to two other creatures. For each creature sacrificed this way, draw a card.

Trample
When this creature enters, each opponent sacrifices an artifact of their choice. Then this creature deals 3 damage to each opponent. It deals 6 damage to each opponent who didn't sacrifice an artifact with mana value 3 or greater this way instead.
Whenever this creature or a commander you control attacks, for each opponent, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block” that's tapped and attacking that player.

Haste
Whenever this creature attacks while you control a commander, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Speedy stone statues from the Easton Kingdom, Kamek recently found some that Tatanga left behind.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flash
Deathtouch
When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control. If you do, you draw a card and this creature gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.

Trample
Other Minions, Nobles, and Villains you control have trample and haste.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/1 red Robot Minion artifact creature token.
Partner—Cross Villains [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Each player rolls two six-sided dice. For each opponent, Bowser's Chance Time deals damage to that player equal to the difference between the total of their results and the total of your results. If less than 3 damage is dealt to that player this way, you create X Treasure tokens, where X is 3 minus the amount of damage dealt to that player.

First strike
Whenever you or a spell or permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, create a Treasure token.
Sacrifice five Treasures: Gain control of target artifact. Untap it.

Flying
Whenever you cast a spell that shares a creature type with your commander, you surveil 1 and Kamek deals 1 damage to each opponent. If that spell is your commander, instead you surveil 3 and Kamek deals 3 damage to each opponent.
Partner—Cross Villains [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Flying, menace
At the beginning of your end step, each opponent who lost life this turn faces a villainous choice — That player loses 4 life and discards a card at random, or each of your other opponents loses 4 life and you draw a card.

Protection from Dogs
When Madame Broode enters, target opponent creates Chompikins, a legendary 6/6 Dog Minion artifact creature token with “Whenever you lose life, each opponent who controls a Noble gains that much life” and “Whenever you discard one or more cards, each opponent who controls a Noble draws that many cards.”

Flying, lifelink
Whenever Marx deals combat damage to a player, exile that many cards from the top of that player's library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost.
Partner—Cross Villains [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Haste
Whenever a creature you control with haste attacks, Topmaniac deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker. If you were dealt damage this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Topmaniac.
This token can't block.

Return each creature card with mana value 3 or less and up to one Hero or Noble card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Exile this spell.

Whenever you cast an Aura spell, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an Aura card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Flying
As long as Lakilester is attacking, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to other attacking creatures you control.
At the beginning of each end step, if damage was prevented this turn, create two 1/1 red Turtle Egg creature tokens with “This token can't block”

When Tayce T. enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a Food token.
Whenever you gain life, create a Super token attached to up to one target creature you control. [i](It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and “Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.”)[/i]

Flying
Whenever Tippi or another legendary permanent you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Each commander creature you control gets +X/+0 and gain first strike and haste until end of turn.
Flashback {X}{R}{R} [i](You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)[/i]

Whenever a source you control deals excess noncombat damage to a creature you don't control, Bobbery deals twice that much damage to that creature's controller.
[i]Bomb [/i]— {3}{R}: Bobbery deals 2 damage to target creature you don't control.

Menace
Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.
Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Daisy.

Enchant creature
Enchant creature has myriad. Those tokens aren't legendary.
Stock

Menace
Whenever Paper Mario attacks, you may exert him. When you do, copy up to two other triggered abilities you control. You may choose new targets for those abilities. [i](An exerted creature won't untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Whenever another legendary creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Watt.
As long as Watt has three or more counters on her, she has first strike
As long as Watt has six or more counters on her, she has double strike.

Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and is a Giant in addition to its other types.
Whenever an enchanted creature or enchantment creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

Indestructible
When this creature enters, clear a stage for each creature you control with power 4 or greater. [i](When you clear a stage, draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world. Draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)[/i]

Flying
Whenever you cast an enchantment spell with mana value greater than this creature's power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, draw a card, then you can put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

This spell can't be countered.
Permanent spells you control can't be countered.
{T}: Add {G}.
{3}{G}, {T}: Whenever an enchanted creature you control deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card.

Enchant land you control
As this Aura enters, choose a color.
Untap enchanted land during each opponent's untap step.
Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, add one mana of the chosen color.

Choose three. You can choose the same mode more than once.
• Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Destroy target enchantment.

Enchant creature
When this aura enters, create X 1/1 white Performer creature tokens.
Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.

Captive Peach enters under the control of an opponent of your choice.
Captive Peach can't attack or block.
Whenever a creature attacks you, untap it. It gains menace until end of turn.
{5}, Sacrifice Captive Peach: Her owner draws a card and creates two Treasure tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

Trample, haste
Whenever DK & Diddy attacks, double each other attacking creature's power until end of turn.

[i]Clay Shooting [/i]— Whenever one or more commanders you control attack, Duck Hunt Duo deals 2 damage to each defending player. Create a Treasure token for each player dealt damage this way.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Enchant legendary creature you control
Auras you control have hexproof and indestructible.
Enchanted creature gets +10/+10 and can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

All creatures can attack your opponents as though those creatures had haste.
Creatures that entered this turn and that aren't attacking you get +1/+0 and have trample.

Haste
[i]Shooting Star Shot — [/i]Whenever Geno attacks for the first time each turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Then if you control three or more attacking enchanted creatures, untap all attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

Enchant creature or Vehicle
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has ward {2} and “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create that many Treasure tokens.”

This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is its target's power.
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature has base power 6 and has trample and lifelink.

Vigilance
Kooper enters with a shield counter on him. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
When Kooper enters, put a shield counter on each other modified creature you control. [i](Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)[/i]

Whenever an Aura enters attached to Luigi, you may create a token that's a copy of it attached to another target legendary creature you control.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Reach
Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, Mallow deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life.
{2}{R}{G}, Sacrifice an Aura with mana value 1 or greater: Discover X, where X is that Aura's mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever Mario attacks, create a tapped Treasure token for each Aura attached to him.
Partner—Cross Heroes [i](You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)[/i]

Flying
At the beginning of your end step, return target Aura card from your graveyard to your hand if you attacked with a commander this turn.

Flying
Untap each enchanted permanent you control during each opponent's untap step.
Whenever you attack, for each defending player, tap target creature that player controls.

Flying, lifelink
Starshroom gets +1/+0 for each other creature and/or enchantment you control.
When this Vehicle enters, create a 1/1 green and white Fungus Hero Creature token with Vigilance and a 1/1 colorless Star enchantment creature token with flying.
Crew 2

As Super Princess Peach enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one. Peach and each enchanted creature you control have the last chosen ability.
• [i]Joy[/i] — Flying
• [i]Rage [/i]— First strike
• [i]Gloom [/i]— Deathtouch
• [i]Calm [/i]— Lifelink

[i]Veil — [/i]At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.
[i]Fiery Hex[/i] — During your turn, double all damage commanders you control would deal to your opponents and to permanents your opponents control.

Vigilance
Whenever Yoshi Kid enters or attacks, choose a kind of counter at random that he doesn't have on him from among first strike, menace, reach, and trample. Put a counter of that kind on Yoshi Kid. If he has a counter of each of those kinds on him, put two +1/+1 counters on him instead.

Flying, vigilance

{4}{U}: Draw a card. Create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block.”

Minion, Noble, and Villain spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
For each creature you control with expendable, increase its expendable value by 1. [i](For example, if that creature has expendable {1}, it becomes expendable 2 and you create a 2/2 Minion when it dies. If a creature has multiple instances of expendable, increase each one separately.)[/i]

When General Guy enters, create a number of 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block” equal to the number of opponents you have.
[i]Charge! [/i]— Tap three untapped creatures you control: General Guy deals 2 damage to each opponent.

First strike
[i]Steal Voice[/i] — Whenever Cackletta attacks, each noncommander creature defending player controls loses all abilities until your next turn.

When Reznor enters, create three 3/3 black Minion creature tokens with “This token can't block.”
Whenever a token you control leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 2 life.

Trample
[i]Topple[/i] — When King Whomp enters, he deals damage to each opponent equal to twice the number of nonbasic lands that player controls. Each player dealt damage this way sacrifices a nonbasic land of their choice.

The next time you attack with one or more noncreature tokens this turn, create that many 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with “This token can't block” that are attacking. Then untap each attacking creature you control. After that combat phase, there's an additional combat phase.
Exile Wonder Rush.

Indestructible
Whenever you play a land or cast a spell, draw a card.
At the beginning of your end step, you lose half your life, rounded up, unless you sacrifice three other creatures.

Trample, haste
Whenever Dry Bowser attacks, mill three cards. You may play one of those cards this turn.

Whenever you lose life, each opponent who controls a Noble gains that much life.
Whenever you discard one or more cards, each opponent who controls a Noble draws that many cards.
You may have Shadow Mario enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it's an Ooze Minion in addition to its other types, it isn't legendary, and it has expendable 3.

Whenever Bowser Jr. enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, goad one or two target creatures. [i](Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)[/i]
Goaded creatures get +1/+0 and have first strike and “This creature can't block.”

When this creature enters, tap target creature or artifact you don't control and put two stun counters on it.
Encore {6}{U}{U} [i]({6}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)[/i]

Starting with the next opponent in turn order, each opponent separates all creatures they control into three piles. For each opponent, choose one of their piles. Each player sacrifices all chosen permanents they control. [i](Piles can be empty.)[/i]

Sneak {3}{U}{U} [i](You may cast this spell for {3}{U}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. They enter tapped and attacking.)[/i]
The Ba-Boom Brothers can't be blocked.
Whenever The Ba-Boom Brothers deal combat damage to a player, goad target creature that player controls. If they entered this turn, goad each creature that player controls instead.

Flash
Minion Offering [i](You may cast this spell as though it had flash by sacrificing a Minion and paying the difference in mana costs between this and the sacrificed Minion. Mana cost includes color.)[/i]
When this creature enters, if it was cast for its offering cost, return each other creature and spell with lesser mana value than the offered permanent to their owner's hands.

At the beginning of your end step, draw a card if you created a token this turn.
{3}{U}: Until end of turn, target legendary creature you control gains “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it except it's not legendary and is a 1/1.”

Flying, deathtouch
Whenever King Boo attacks, you and defending player each reveal the top card of your library. You lose life equal to the lowest mana value among cards revealed this way, then defending player loses life equal to the greatest mana value among those cards. You each put the card you revealed into your hand.

Menace, deathtouch
Whenever one or more tokens you control deal combat damage to a player, that player gets two poison counters. If King Hisstocrat dealt damage to that player this turn, they get four poison counters instead. [i](A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)[/i]

Flying, vigilance
Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast
Whenever Wingo attacks, defending player exiles the top card of their library.You may play that card until you exile another card with Wingo.

Flying, lifelink
[i]Sour Grapes[/i] — Whenever you gain life, you may pay twice that much life. If you do, draw a card for each 1 life you gained.
[i]The Ultimate Tragedy[/i] — Whenever a player loses the game, put four +1/+1 counters on Madame Grape.

You may cast this spell without paying its mana cost if it targets a spell or ability targeting your commander.
You may choose new targets for target spell or ability with only one target. This spell deals 2 damage to that spell or ability's controller.
